args: set -euo pipefail; script="$(find "$HOME/plugins" "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache" -path '*/telegram-communicator/scripts/run-mcptelegram.sh' -type f 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)"; if [ -z "$script" ]; then echo "Could not find telegram-communicator run-mcptelegram.sh." >&2; exit 1; fi; exec bash "$script"
telegram-communicator.note: Loads Telegram credentials from ~/.codex/telegram-mcp.env, then starts the local Telegram MCP stdio server.
